education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Networks and Data Communications

experience.description: Designed a multi-step pipeline with FlowiseAI and LangChain for a RAG system. Tested via FlowiseAI interface and locally to evaluate accuracy.
Trained a sentiment classification model on 51,000 Kaggle samples, achieving 87% accuracy. Deployed a demo using Streamlit, supporting text and Reddit data input.
Designed requirements, ERD diagrams, and system architecture. Implemented with MySQL and MongoDB using a microservices model.
Configured Odoo modules (Recruitment, Employees, Surveys, Fixed Assets). Simulated recruitment and fixed asset management processes in a classroom setting.
